air-fryer-cornish-hen.name: Air Fryer Cornish Hen

ingredients.item: Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat an air fryer to 199°C (200 degrees C).
Pat Cornish hen dry with paper towels and season with salt and pepper on all sides.

Place hen into the air fryer basket and cook in the preheated air fryer for 15 minutes. Spray the top with nonstick spray and cook until no longer pink at the bone and the juices run clear, about 15 more minutes. An instant-read thermometer inserted near the bone should read 74°C (74 degrees C).
Transfer hen to a cutting board and let rest for 10 minutes. Carve and serve.

air-fryer-frozen-chicken-tenders.name: Air Fryer Frozen Chicken Tenders

ingredients.item: Salt and freshly ground pepper to taste

instructions: Rinse chicken tenders under cold running water and wash off any ice. Pat dry with paper towels. Lightly spray chicken tenders with avocado oil and season with salt and pepper.
Place chicken tenders in an air fryer basket, making sure the pieces don't overlap.

Cook in the air fryer at 182°C (180 degrees C) for 15 minutes. Turn chicken tenders over and continue cooking until chicken is no longer pink in the center and the juices run clear, about 8 more minutes. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the center should read at least 74°C (74 degrees C).

air-fryer-grilled-peaches-with-cinnamon.name: Air Fryer Grilled Peaches With Cinnamon
instructions: Preheat an air fryer to 177°C (175 degrees C) according to manufacturer's instructions.
Place peach halves flesh-sides down in air fryer basket; cook for 6 minutes.

Meanwhile, place butter in a microwave-safe bowl; microwave in 15 to 30 second intervals until melted. Stir in brown sugar and cinnamon until sugar has dissolved; microwave in 10 to 15 second intervals, if needed.
Flip peaches flesh-sides up using tongs; brush butter mixture over tops, filling pit cavities with any excess. Cook 6 minutes more.
Cool peaches for 5 minutes; top each half with 1 scoop ice cream.

air-fryer-pretzel-bites.name: Air Fryer Pretzel Bites
instructions: Mix self-rising flour and Greek yogurt together in a bowl until well combined. Turn out dough onto a floured surface and knead dough comes together.
Roll dough into 3/4-inch thick ropes. Cut each rope into three 5-inch pieces and roll each piece into a small ball.
Preheat an air fryer to 199°C (200 degrees C) for 5 minutes.
Meanwhile, bring water in a large pot to a boil over medium-high heat. Add baking soda to the boiling water. Carefully drop dough balls into the water and cook until they float to the top.
Using a slotted spoon remove dough balls once they float to the top and transfer to the air fryer basket in one line. You might need to cook them in batches.
Cook until pretzel bites are lightly browned, 8 to 10 minutes.
Spray pretzel bites with nonstick cooking spray and sprinkle kosher salt on top. Serve and enjoy.

air-fryer-sausage-patties.name: Air Fryer Sausage Patties
instructions: Grab your ingredients, and preheat an air fryer to 204°C (200 degrees C). Lightly grease the inside of the air fryer basket with nonstick spray.
Arrange sausage patties in a single layer in the air fryer basket.

Cook in the preheated air fryer for 5 minutes; flip the patties and cook about 3 minutes more. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the center of a patty should read at least 71°C (70 degrees C).
Serve hot and enjoy!

anytime-chocolate-chip-and-oat-cookies.name: Anytime Chocolate Chip And Oat Cookies

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or 1 tsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep: coarsely chopped, or 1 0.25 cups semisweet chocolate chips or wafers (disks, pistoles, fèves)

instructions: Place a rack in middle of oven; preheat to 177°C. Toast nuts on a rimmed baking sheet until slightly darkened in color and fragrant, 6–8 minutes. Transfer to a plate and let cool.
Meanwhile, spread out seeds and coconut on same baking sheet and toast until seeds are slightly darkened in color and coconut is golden, about 5 minutes. Let cool on baking sheet.

Whisk all-purpose flour, whole grain flour, salt, and baking soda in a medium bowl to combine. Vigorously whisk brown sugar and butter in a large bowl until very thick and smooth, about 30 seconds. Add eggs and vanilla; whisk vigorously until mixture is light and satiny, about 30 seconds. Add dry ingredients and whisk until completely incorporated and batter is smooth. Fold in nuts, seeds, coconut, chocolate, and oats with a rubber spatula until thoroughly distributed.

Using a 2-oz. scoop or ¼ cup measuring cup, portion out dough, placing on a parchment-lined baking sheet as you go and spacing as close together as possible (it’s okay if they touch slightly). Cover tightly with plastic wrap and freeze until frozen solid, 2–3 hours. (If you can’t wait for cookies to freeze, chill in refrigerator just until firm instead, at least 30 minutes and up to 3 days. Cookies might bake a minute or two faster.)

If needed, reheat oven to 177°C. Arrange up to 8 cookies on a large parchment-lined baking sheet, spacing at least 2" apart. (These cookies are large and will spread, so use another baking sheet if baking more than 8 cookies and place racks in upper and lower thirds of oven.) Bake, rotating baking sheet front to back (and top to bottom if using 2) halfway through, until deep golden brown and wrinkled around the edges (centers should still be pale and slightly shiny), 16–20 minutes. Let cool on baking sheet.
Do Ahead: Dough can be made 2 months ahead; transfer frozen balls to an airtight container and keep frozen. Cookies can be baked 3 days ahead; store airtight at room temperature.

aperol-spritz.name: Aperol Spritz
instructions:
Thread olives onto a swizzle stick. Pour Aperol and Prosecco into a rocks glass filled with ice. Top off with soda and gently stir with swizzle stick with olives.
Read More: The 29 New Essential Recipes from the Bon Appétit Test Kitchen

aperol-spritz-what-it-is-and-how-to-prep.name: Aperol Spritz, What It Is And How To Prepare This Refreshing Italian Cocktail
aperol-spritz-what-it-is-and-how-to-prep.original_name: Aperol Spritz, qué es y cómo preparar este refrescante cóctel italiano
instructions: Fill a glass or a high glass with ice.
Swallow 3 parts of sparkling wine into the glass.
Add 2 parts of Aperol to the cup.
Add 1 piece of water with gas to the cup.
Gently remove the ingredients with a spoon.
Decorate with an orange slice.

apple-brie-crostinis.name: Apple Brie Crostinis
instructions: Preheat the oven to 288°C (285°C), or as high as your oven will go. Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Using a serrated knife, slice the baguette crosswise on a slight diagonal into ½-inch (1 cm) slices. Transfer the baguette slices to the prepared baking sheet.
Top each piece of bread with 1-2 slices of Brie cheese.
Bake for 5 minutes, or until Brie begins to bubble and the bread is toasted.
Top each piece of bread with 1-2 apple slices and candied walnuts. Drizzle with honey.
Enjoy!

apple-compote-healthy-recipe-comedera.name: Apple Compote, Healthy Recipe
instructions: We'll start with the orange skin. We can use a peller to get them, but we have to avoid as far as we can. Another important point is that the skin is well clear and that preferably, it's a bio or untreated orange, to prevent its skin from being impregnated with pesticides.
Orange skin can be used in ribbons or pieces, just as it goes off with the help of the peller. Once the orange's been peeled, we'll have his skin booked.

We'll get them apples as well. We'll put them down and remove them from the centre with their seeds and their hearts. We will also leave them cut into pieces (no matter how bad they are or how bad they are). Do not throw skin from apples because depending on each person's taste, we can have a share of this recipe. I usually do that because this gives more compot and more fiber content.
The following will be to heat up a pan with 350 billion water, sugar, lemon juice and orange skin.
We'll let this mixture boil to form a slightly thick liquid as a syrup or syrup.
Once we have boiled, we will add the apple pieces we have peeled and cut earlier.
Luego sumaremos la canela en polvo o la rama de canela.
We'll leave this blend cooking for about 30 minutes with a covered saucer. It's important that the fire remains low to prevent its preparations from burning.

After this time, the mixture should have been golden and apple pieces should be practically broken. If necessary, we can let the compot cook a little more. If we look at the very dry mix, we can add a little more water.

Once we have cooked the compot, we can stir it a little more with a wooden spoon to standardize consistency. That's also the right time to try our recipe's timing. If you weren't sweet enough, you can add some more sugar. Otherwise, to remove some sweetness, you can add some water or more lemon, or both. The lemon should not be abused so as to avoid falling into the risk that the compot will become acid. In any case, after making the adjustments, we have to scramble everything really well.

In principle, apple compote isn't an entirely uniform production of consistency, but lovers of homogenous textures can pass production through a blender or robot. If that's the case, you have to remove the orange skin before processing the mixture and cinnamon, if added in branch and not powder.
For those of us who follow the traditional style without helping us with the blender, we have to remove an orange skin as well as a cinnamon branch if necessary.
That's all. We can choose between serving the compot still a little tibia or letting it refrigerate before we start eating.

apple-crepe-dessert-lezzet.name: Apple Crepe Dessert
instructions: 1. For sos, take sugar in the pan and wait until stirring.
2. Insert and drop it into melt.
3. Add to the cream and get from the stove after cooking for a few minutes.
4. Peel the shells of apples and remove it in the form of iri cubes and pan.
5. Add sugar and vanilla and cook until softening in medium fire.
6. Add and get from the stove.
7. Fold the pancakes in the dörde and take the serving plates.
8. Place apples inside.
9. Add vanilla ice cream on it and serve after visiting caramel sauce.

apple-dip.name: Apple Dip
instructions: Stir cream cheese, brown sugar, and vanilla extract together until sugar has dissolved and mixture is smooth. Serve with fresh apple slices.

apple-tarte-tatin-pequerecetas.name: Apple Tarte Tatin
instructions: He starts with his apples. Take his heart back and cut them into quarters. While cutting them up, it's a good idea to spray them with lemon juice. That doesn't just help them to get rusty, but will also give them an acid touch that will well balance the candy.

In a big frying pan that you can get into the oven, melt butter over medium heat. When melted, add the sugar. We have to be careful about that. It gently removes till the sugar dissolve and forms a golden caramel. Don't leave the kitchen at this step, that caramel has its own life and can go from perfect to burned in a second.
Once you have the candy ready, put the apple rooms in the frying pan so they cover the whole bottom. It's okay if they overlap a little, but try and get them well distributed.
Cocina a fuego medio durante unos 10-15 minutos, hasta que las manzanas empiecen a ablandarse y se impregnen bien del caramelo.

When the apples are ready, remove the frying pan from the fire and let it cool a little. Now, cover the apples with broken dough, and put the edges into the frying pan. The dough should "put them up" well so as to turn his back his cake doesn't get broken.

It purifies the oven at 180 ° C. Put the frying pan into the oven and baker for about 25-30 minutes, or till the dough is golden and crispy. You'll see that while she's baked, the candy and apples are still cooking, which will give the cake its bright look.

That's the thrilling part, but don't worry, she's got his trick. Let the cake rest a few minutes after I get it out of the oven. Then with great care, put a big plate onto the frying pan and turn it around at once but without hesitation as with an omelette of potatoes. Your apple tatin cake's ready to serve!

apple-bacon-and-cheddar-panini.name: Apple, Bacon, And Cheddar Panini
instructions: {'step': '1', 'description': 'Preheat a panini press.'}
{'step': '2', 'description': 'Butter 2 of the bread slices.'}
{'step': '3', 'description': 'Place 1 slice on the panini press, buttered-side-down.'}
{'step': '4', 'description': 'Arrange Cheddar cheese on the bread; lay unbuttered bread on top.'}
{'step': '5', 'description': 'Place bacon and apple on top;'}
{'step': '6', 'description': 'cover with the remaining slice of bread, buttered side-up.'}
{'step': '7', 'description': 'Close the press and cook until panini is browned, about 4 minutes.'}

apple-rhubarb-crumble.name: Apple-rhubarb Crumble

ingredients.item: Baking apples (such as pink lady or honeycrisp; about 3 large)

instructions: Whisk oats, all-purpose flour, whole wheat flour, brown sugar, cinnamon, and salt in a medium bowl. Using your fingertips, work in butter until no dry spots remain and mixture holds together when squeezed. Cover and chill while you prepare the filling.

Preheat oven to 350°. Butter a shallow 2-qt. baking dish. Toss apples, rhubarb, granulated sugar, lemon juice, and vanilla in a large bowl; transfer to baking dish. Scatter crumble over fruit, breaking up any large pieces.
Place dish on a foil-lined rimmed baking sheet and bake until crumble is golden brown, juices are bubbling, and apples are tender, 35–50 minutes.
Do Ahead: Unbaked crumble can be assembled 2 days ahead. Cover and chill.

applesauce-puffs.name: Applesauce Puffs
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease 30 mini muffin cups.
Combine baking mix, applesauce, ¼ cup sugar, milk, egg, oil, and 1 teaspoon cinnamon in a bowl until just blended.
Spoon batter into the prepared muffin cups, filling each ¾ full.
Bake in the preheated oven until golden, 12 to 15 minutes.
Meanwhile, place melted butter in a shallow bowl. Combine remaining ½ cup sugar and remaining ¼ teaspoon cinnamon in a separate shallow bowl.
Dip warm puffs in melted butter, then roll in cinnamon-sugar mixture.

argentinian-beef-empanadas.name: Argentinian Beef Empanadas

ingredients.item: (12 each) puff pastry dough for turnovers/empanadas

ingredients.prep: rinsed well, cut in half lengthwise, divided

instructions: Heat 2 Tbsp. oil in a large pot over high. Cook 2 lb. ground beef, breaking up with a spoon, until browned but not completely cooked through, 6–8 minutes. Transfer to a medium bowl with a slotted spoon, leaving as much fat in pan as possible.

Reduce heat to medium and cook 2 medium onions, chopped, 2 small red bell peppers, seeded, chopped, and remaining 1 Tbsp. oil, stirring, until tender but not browned, 6–8 minutes; season with salt and black pepper. Add 3 Tbsp. ground cumin, 2 Tbsp. sweet paprika, 1 Tbsp. dried oregano, and ¼ tsp. cayenne pepper and cook, stirring, until fragrant, about 1 minute. Add 1½ cups low-sodium chicken stock or broth and reserved beef along with any accumulated juices to pot. Stir in 2 tsp. sugar, 4 tsp. salt, and ¼ tsp. black pepper. Bring to a simmer and cook, stirring and scraping up any brown bits, until most of the liquid is evaporated, 15–20 minutes; taste and season with salt and black pepper, if needed. Stir in ½ cup raisins. Transfer to a medium bowl, cover, and chill at least 3 hours.
Do Ahead: Beef filling can be made 3 days ahead. Keep chilled.

Preheat oven to 375°. Let 3 packages Puff Pastry Dough for Empanadas sit at room temperature 15 minutes to temper. Remove 6 rounds from package, keeping plastic divider underneath, and arrange on a work surface. Place 2 Tbsp. filling in the center of each round.
Top with 2 olive halves. Brush water around half of outer edge of each round.
Using plastic divider to help you, fold round over filling and pinch edges to seal.
Using a fork, crimp edges. Remove plastic and transfer empanada to a parchment-lined sheet tray, spacing 1" apart. Repeat with remaining rounds (you’ll get about 12 empanadas on each tray).

Bake empanadas, rotating tray halfway through, until golden brown and slightly darker around the edges, 25–35 minutes.
Do Ahead: Unbaked empanadas can be made 3 months ahead; freeze on sheet tray, then transfer to freezer bags and keep frozen.

asiago-lemon-tomato-pasta-with-shrimp.name: Asiago Lemon Tomato Pasta With Shrimp
instructions: Preheat oven to 204°C.
Arrange all vegetables in a baking pan and drizzle with olive oil, salt and pepper. Bake for 20 minutes. During this time, cook pasta according to directions on the box.
Once sauteed, set aside vegetables and set aside pasta in a separate pot.
In a frying pan, add diced tomatoes, 1 cup stock, Italian seasoning, pepper, and 1 cup asiago cheese. Add vegetables and cook, stirring frequently.
Then add vegetables.  Cook until hot, stirring frequently.
Add shrimp and lemon juice and stir until shrimp is heated.
Melt remaining asiago, garnish with parsley, sliced lemon, and serve.
Enjoy!

avocado-cream-sauce.name: Avocado Cream Sauce
instructions: Combine avocados, green onions, garlic, cilantro, lime juice, and tarragon in the bowl of a food processor; purée until smooth.

Melt butter in a saucepan over low heat. Stir in avocado purée; cook and stir occasionally until heated through, about 5 minutes. Add cream; cook until heated through, but not boiling. Season with salt.

ayran-pastry-lezzet.name: Ayran Pastry
instructions: 1. Take the water, margarine and salt into the pot.
2. Add the flour when it starts to boil water and mix it with a wooden spoon.
3. Take the dough from the stove.
4. Release on the dough tray.
5. Fixin with the pain of the spoon.
6. Small squares with knives.
7. Bake for 25 minutes in oven with a heated 190 degree.
8. Take it from the oven.
9. The b&ouml you cut on the squares; the tip of a tray is published on the edges.
10. In the middle of the bowl interior place and wealth of the frosted island.
